name: AlanClaw Electrical PV Systems
description: Knowledge base for AlanClaw electrical and photovoltaic workflows, including low-voltage distribution, PV system planning, BOQ pre-checks, construction sequence, and inspection coordination.
safety_boundary: Electrical and PV outputs are preliminary planning materials only. Load calculations, cable sizes, protection ratings, grounding, lightning protection, PV string sizing, inverter capacity, generation estimates, grid connection, battery storage, BOQ quantities, prices, and construction safety conclusions require human confirmation.
